info.title: API for Gainium
info.description:
API requires authorization. All REST requests must contain the following headers:

- **token**: Public key of the user  
- **time**: Timestamp of the request in ms  
- **signature**: The base64-encoded signature  

### To sign a request:

1. Use API-Secret to encrypt the prehash string {body+method+endpoint+timestamp} with sha256 HMAC
2. The request body is a JSON string and need to be the same with the parameters passed by the API
3. After that, use base64-encode to encrypt the result in step 1 again

**Example:**
```javascript
crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(body + method + endpoint + time).digest('base64')
```

orderSize.description: DCA order qty of the deal.

baseOrderSize.description: Base order qty of the deal.

useRiskReduction.description: Use risk reduction. Requires riskReductionValue value

useReinvest.description: Use reinvest profit. Requires reinvestValue value

useStaticPriceFilter.description: Use static price filter. Require minOpenDeal or maxOpenDeal

useDynamicPriceFilter.description: Use dynamic price filter. Require dynamicPriceFilterDirection, dynamicPriceFilterOverValue or dynamicPriceFilterUnderValue or both, dynamicPriceFilterPriceType

dynamicPriceFilterDirection.description: Direction of the price filter. Over require dynamicPriceFilterOverValue field, under require dynamicPriceFilterUnderValue field, overAndUnder require both fields

useNoOverlapDeals.description: Use no overlap deals in dynamic price filter

cooldownAfterDealStart.description: Use cooldown after deal start. Require cooldownAfterDealStartInterval and cooldownAfterDealStartUnits

cooldownAfterDealStop.description: Use cooldown after deal stop. Require cooldownAfterDealStopInterval and cooldownAfterDealStopUnits

useMultiSl.description: Use multiple SL targets. multiSl array should be provided.

trailingSl.description: Use trailing SL. Cannot be checked with active moveSL or multiSl.

moveSL.description: Use move SL. Cannot be checked with active trailingSl or multiSl. Require moveSLTrigger and moveSLValue.

dealCloseCondition.description: Deal close options. For deal only possible option - tp.

closeByTimer.description: Close deal by timer. Require closeByTimerValue and closeByTimerUnits.

useMultiTp.description: Use multiple TP targets. multiTp array should be provided.

trailingTp.description: Use trailing TP. Cannot be checked with active multiTp. Require trailingTpPerc.

dcaCondition.description: DCA Type. For deal available options - percentage, custom. Custom required dcaCustom array.

orderSize.description: DCA order qty of the deal.

baseOrderSize.description: Base order qty of the deal.

useRiskReduction.description: Use risk reduction. Requires riskReductionValue value

useReinvest.description: Use reinvest profit. Requires reinvestValue value

useStaticPriceFilter.description: Use static price filter. Require minOpenDeal or maxOpenDeal

useDynamicPriceFilter.description: Use dynamic price filter. Require dynamicPriceFilterDirection, dynamicPriceFilterOverValue or dynamicPriceFilterUnderValue or both, dynamicPriceFilterPriceType

dynamicPriceFilterDirection.description: Direction of the price filter. Over require dynamicPriceFilterOverValue field, under require dynamicPriceFilterUnderValue field, overAndUnder require both fields

useNoOverlapDeals.description: Use no overlap deals in dynamic price filter

cooldownAfterDealStart.description: Use cooldown after deal start. Require cooldownAfterDealStartInterval and cooldownAfterDealStartUnits

cooldownAfterDealStop.description: Use cooldown after deal stop. Require cooldownAfterDealStopInterval and cooldownAfterDealStopUnits

comboTpBase.description: Base SL on user DCA or max DCA. Default - filled.

status.description: OK - execution of query is successful, NOTOK - execution of query failed

reason.description: If status - NOTOK, reason will contain failed reason, otherwise - null

parameters.name: exchangeId
parameters.description: Id of the exchange. Optional, if not provided - all exchanges will be used

parameters.name: paperContext
parameters.description: Paper context. If not provided - all exchanges will be used. If exchange is provided - paper context will be skipped

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number. Results will be paginated by 500 assets

parameters.name: assets
parameters.description: Assets to filter. If not provided - all assets will be used. Comma separated list of assets

status.description: OK - execution of query is successful, NOTOK - execution of query failed

reason.description: If status - NOTOK, reason will contain failed reason, otherwise - null

get.description: Retrieve a list of user deals.

parameters.name: terminal
parameters.description: False - get regular deals, true - get terminal deals

parameters.name: botId
parameters.description: Id of bot, deal belongs to

status.description: OK - execution of query is successful, NOTOK - execution of query failed

reason.description: If status - NOTOK, reason will contain failed reason, otherwise - null

base.description: Initial base balance of the deal

quote.description: Initial quote balance of the deal

quote.description: Current quote balance of the deal

profit.description: Profit of the deal. Show value after when deal is cloase, in other statuses - 0

orderSize.description: DCA order qty of the deal

orderSizePercQty.description: Order size, if bot order size type set to percent free or percent total

userId.description: Id of the user, deal belongs to

post.description: Requires write permission of API keys. Format of the pair is {base}_{quote}, example BTC_USDT

parameters.name: botId
parameters.description: Id of the bot. Either botId or botName should be provided. botId has higher priority

parameters.name: botName
parameters.description: Name to search. Either botId or botName should be provided. botId has higher priority

parameters.name: pairsToChange
parameters.description: Pairs to update. Either pairsToChange or pairsToSet should be provided. pairsToSet has higher priority

parameters.name: pairsToSet
parameters.description: Pairs to set. Either pairsToChange or pairsToSet should be provided. pairsToSet has higher priority

parameters.name: pairsToSetMode
parameters.description: Pairs to set mode. Default replace
